# Vendored MCP SDK Placeholder

Phase 2 introduces the stdio MCP server and subprocess bridge.

At this stage, BlenderPilot ships a minimal internal JSON-RPC MCP-compatible
server implementation in `mcp_server/main.py` to keep iteration fast.

Before MVP release, this directory should contain the official vendored `mcp`
Python SDK (or a pinned subset) once packaging and binary dependency handling
is finalized.
